# Rézolibri Simulator

Digital infrastructure for recruitment and interim professionals. Estimate your net income as an independent recruitment agency owner.

## Key Links
- [Simulator](https://simu.rezolibri.fr/)
- [Main Website](https://rezolibri.fr)
- [Join the Network](https://rezolibri.fr/rejoindre)

## Core Capabilities
- Real-time net income estimation based on ETP (Equivalent Time Employees).
- Dynamic calculation of social contributions (with or without ACRE).
- Automated Business Plan (PDF) generation for 2026.
- Integration with legal and banking partners (Qonto, Orus).
